name: Abrir la URL, loguearse y navegar a agent

testSteps.description: Given el actor tiene un navegador disponible
When abre la pagina de casos

children.description: Abre la pagina de casos

Sara opens the browser at https://us-east-1s66ymlwwk.auth.us-east-1.amazoncognito.com/login?client_id=2hfo5293cfbh1h9fbe9m7g07dn&response_type=code&scope=email+openid+profile&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fasistenciaapp.kit.sura-konecta.com%2Fauth
Login con Cognito usando credenciales

Sara opens the browser at https://us-east-1s66ymlwwk.auth.us-east-1.amazoncognito.com/login?client_id=2hfo5293cfbh1h9fbe9m7g07dn&response_type=code&scope=email+openid+profile&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fasistenciaapp.kit.sura-konecta.com%2Fauth
Sara enters 'BOT01' into cognito username field
Sara clicks on cognito next button
Sara enters 'Yt7PNg_VnXkvsQ*tPmfi' into cognito password field
Sara clicks on cognito continue button
Sara opens the browser at https://asistenciaapp.kit.sura-konecta.com/agent
Navega a la pagina de agent
Sara opens the browser at https://asistenciaapp.kit.sura-konecta.com/agent

testSteps.description:
And diligencia caso express completo desde feature
| departamento_solicita | municipio_solicita | servicios_especiales | gestor_coordinacion | linea | servicio |
| ANTIOQUIA | MEDELLIN | NO | NO | AUTOS | PASO DE GASOLINA |

And diligenciamos el proveedor
| Nombre del proveedor | Servicio |
| PROVEEDOR PRUEBA | TOMA SERVICIO |
And transicionamos los estados del caso
Then deberia ver la ruta agent
